hero.title: I build fast, polished web products.
hero.subtitle: Hi, I'm Tan Ngoc. I design and ship end-to-end web apps for startups and founders who care about craft.

services.title: What I can build for you
services.subtitle: From idea to launch — or just the parts you need help with.

web.title: Web applications
web.description: Full-stack web apps with React, TypeScript and a database — built to ship and built to scale.

mobile.title: Mobile apps
mobile.description: Cross-platform iOS and Android with React Native, sharing logic with the web.

consulting.title: Consulting & audits
consulting.description: Code review, architecture sessions, performance audits — short engagements that move the needle.

mvp.title: MVP sprints
mvp.description: Founder-friendly two-to-six week sprints to turn an idea into something real you can show users.

process.title: How I work
process.subtitle: A predictable rhythm so we know what's next, every week.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: We map the problem, users and constraints. You get a written brief before any code.

design.title: Design
design.description: Wireframes and a shared visual direction so we agree on the look before we build.

build.title: Build
build.description: Iterative weekly releases on a staging URL. You see progress every Friday.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: Production deploy, handover docs, and 30 days of post-launch support included.

one.quote: Tan Ngoc shipped our MVP in five weeks — clean code and an interface that finally feels like our product.
one.name: Linh Pham

two.quote: Responsive, thoughtful and obsessed with the details. The dashboard he rebuilt is twice as fast.
two.name: Marc Dubois

three.quote: Pleasure to work with. Asked the right questions before writing a single line of code.
three.name: An Nguyen

cta.title: Got something in mind?
cta.subtitle: Tell me about your project — I read every message and reply within 24 hours.
